W

W - Static variable in class be.ac.umons.backend.windowing.WindowerEngineTest
 
Window - Class in be.ac.umons.backend.windowing
Represents a rectangular query window defined by its bounds in the Cartesian plane: [xMin, xMax] × [yMin, yMax].
Window(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class be.ac.umons.backend.windowing.Window
Constructs a rectangular window from four boundary values.
windowerEngine - Variable in class be.ac.umons.frontend.WindowingController
 
WindowerEngine - Class in be.ac.umons.backend.windowing
Engine that applies windowing queries to a set of axis-aligned segments.
WindowerEngine(List<Segment>, List<Segment>) - Constructor for class be.ac.umons.backend.windowing.WindowerEngine
Constructs a windowing engine from two lists of segments.
WindowerEngineTest - Class in be.ac.umons.backend.windowing
 
WindowerEngineTest() - Constructor for class be.ac.umons.backend.windowing.WindowerEngineTest
 
WindowingController - Class in be.ac.umons.frontend
Controls the user interface for visualizing axis-aligned segments and applying windowing queries.
WindowingController(Stage) - Constructor for class be.ac.umons.frontend.WindowingController
Creates a controller bound to the given JavaFX stage.
WindowTest - Class in be.ac.umons.backend.windowing
 
WindowTest() - Constructor for class be.ac.umons.backend.windowing.WindowTest
